home.title: Zacc Színpad
home.subtitle: We work at the intersections of performances, community spaces and collaborations. We create theatrical and performative forms that are open, alive, and seek a connection with their audiences.

intro.label: About us
intro.title: Contemporary, collective theatre work in motion
intro.text: Zacc Színpad is a creative environment in which performance, workshop, open rehearsal and community presence strengthen one another. Flexibility, personal connection, and creating works that can speak in different spaces and situations are important to us.

performances.label: Repertoire
performances.title: Performances and productions available for invitation
performances.text: We present selected works that can be realised in different venues and collaborative settings.

ensemble.label: People
ensemble.title: The ensemble and individual creative profiles
ensemble.text: The members of the team can also be presented individually, so the site functions both as a collective and as a professional portfolio.

cta.label: Connection
cta.title: Would you like to work with us, invite us, or learn more?
cta.text: We are open to collaborations, invitations, and professional exchange.
